IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE THEN PLTF WILL FILE FOR A WRIT OF POSSESSION WITH 24 HRS EX-PARTE NOTICE. DEFTS WAIVE CLAIM FOR UNLAWFUL EVICTION. TRIAL DATE VACATED.
